pageDescription: Perform advanced mathematical calculations and scientific functions including trigonometry, logarithms, exponents, and statistical operations

trig.title: Trigonometric Functions
trig.description: sin, cos, tan and their inverses (asin, acos, atan)

log.title: Logarithmic Functions
log.description: log (base 10), ln (natural log), and log base n

stat.title: Statistical Functions
stat.description: Mean, median, standard deviation, and other statistical operations

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides mathematical calculations only
criticalWarningsList.precision: Results are limited by computational precision and rounding

importantNotesList: Ensure correct angle mode for trigonometric calculations
Be aware of domain restrictions for certain functions
Check calculation history for complex multi-step problems
Use appropriate number of significant figures in your results

messages.enterInformation: Enter your mathematical expression or select a function
messages.resultMessage: The result of your calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides mathematical computations based on standard scientific formulas. Results are subject to computational precision limitations and should be verified for critical applications.

seekHelp.title: Mathematical Resources
seekHelp.content: For complex mathematical problems or specialized applications, consider consulting mathematical professionals or using specialized software tools designed for advanced mathematics.

errors.inputValue: Please enter a valid mathematical expression
errors.domain: Input value is outside the domain of this function
errors.overflow: Calculation result is too large to display

tooltips.operation: Select the mathematical operation to perform
tooltips.inputValue: Enter the value or expression to calculate
tooltips.angleMode: Select the angle measurement mode for trigonometric functions
tooltips.numberBase: Select the number base for calculations

enter_your_expression_or_use_the_buttons: Enter your expression or use the buttons below
you_can_copy_or_use_this_value_as_needed: You can copy or use this value as needed.
type_your_math_expression_or_use_the_but: Type your math expression or use the buttons.
use_functions_like_sinx_cosx_tanx_logx_x: Use functions like sin(x), cos(x), tan(x), log(x), √(x), ^ for powers, n! for factorial, π, e, memory, and more.
use_degrad_toggle_ans_for_last_answer_me: Use Deg/Rad toggle, Ans for last answer, memory buttons, and brackets for grouping.
